---
title: "Soils Data Ingestion"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  input_file: "data-raw/soils_field_forms.xlsx"
  project_id: "PROJECT_ID"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(here)
```

## Load field data

```{r load}
# Each row = one soil horizon from a pit or probe
soils_raw <- readxl::read_excel(here(params$input_file), sheet = "Soils")
glimpse(soils_raw)
```

## Standardise column names

```{r rename}
# TODO: map Excel headers to standard fields:
# plot_id, depth_top_cm, depth_bot_cm, horizon_code, munsell_hue, munsell_value,
# munsell_chroma, texture, structure, mottles, von_post, material_type, notes
soils <- soils_raw |> janitor::clean_names()
```

## Confirm pit inventory

```{r summary}
soils |> distinct(plot_id) |> arrange(plot_id)
```

## Save

```{r save}
saveRDS(soils, here("data-raw", paste0(params$project_id, "_soils_ingested.rds")))
```
